title: TableDescription
description: Represents the properties of a DynamoDB table

TableStatus.description: The current state of the table

TableArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the table

CreationDateTime.description: The date and time when the table was created

KeySchema.description: The primary key structure for the table

AttributeDefinitions.description: An array of attribute definitions for the table

TableSizeBytes.description: The total size of the table in bytes

ItemCount.description: The number of items in the table

GlobalSecondaryIndexes.description: The global secondary indexes on the table

LocalSecondaryIndexes.description: The local secondary indexes on the table

BillingModeSummary.description: Contains details about the billing mode for the table
